chapter_opened.description: North-star = active user. UTM IS present.

chapter_completed.description: Engaged reader. UTM IS present. Has time_spent_sec.

user_registered.description: Registration event. NO UTM params — broken! Only has role, has_email, is_migrated.

app_opened.description: PWA/app launch. NOT a business event. UTM present.

Application opened.description: Variant of app_opened. Seen in Overall Platform dashboard.

comment_created.description: Engagement event. UTM present. Used in Campaign ROI dashboard.

novel_card_clicked.description: Discovery event. Has source, source_surface. UTM present.

$pageview.description: Page view. UTM present on landing. $host = novelpedia.net or author.novelpedia.net or demo.novelpedia.net. title = page title.

$autocapture.description: Auto-captured interactions. UTM present (from URL). High volume.

$identify.description: Person identification. $initial_utm_* set here for person.

$set.description: Person property update (author side). Used to set author properties.

registration_nudge_shown.description: Shown to readers with 143+ chapters read. NOT UTM tracked.

profile_completed.description: Rare. is_author flag indicates reader vs author.

novel_published.description: Author published a novel. NOT seen in raw events yet (very new).

comment_posted.description: Author received a comment. NOT seen in raw events yet.

1458931.name: Executive Overview
1458931.description: Binge Reader North Star + platform health

critical_bugs.impact: Cannot attribute registrations to campaigns. Downstream registration attribution is BROKEN.
critical_bugs.fix: Fix UTM persistence at registration page — set $initial_utm_* on person via identify call

critical_bugs.impact: No funnel objects exist. All funnel-based queries will 404. Must use TrendsQuery event series instead.
critical_bugs.fix: Build funnels via UI or API, or query via TrendsQuery with event series

critical_bugs.impact: Cohort-based queries will return empty. Use person property filters instead.
critical_bugs.fix: Create cohorts manually or use person property filters

critical_bugs.bug: Reader platform dashboard (1483189) queries ONLY demo.novelpedia.net
critical_bugs.impact: novelpedia.net reader data is not in this dashboard. Binge reader metrics may be incomplete.
critical_bugs.fix: Update dashboard tiles to include novelpedia.net OR create separate reader dashboard

critical_bugs.bug: Author events (novel_published, comment_posted) not in raw event stream
critical_bugs.impact: Author platform dashboard may have empty tiles. Author funnel skills will return 0.
critical_bugs.fix: Verify author event instrumentation is firing on author.novelpedia.net

critical_bugs: user_registered: 0% UTM at event AND person level — CRITICAL — registration ROI unmeasurable
chapter_completed: 43.5% unattributable at person level — WARNING
chapter_opened: 45.2% unattributable at person level — WARNING
comment_created: 0% UTM at both levels — WARNING — author dopamine dark

corrected_claims.chapter_completed_90_events: CORRECTED: 1,382 events, 36.3% evt UTM / 56.5% pers UTM
corrected_claims.comment_created_0_events: CORRECTED: 60 events, 0% UTM at both levels
